majorFacilities.name: MetroWest Medical Center — Leonard Morse Hospital

healthcareLandscape._context: Market context only. These facilities are NOT clients of Dory’s Cleaning Services and no copy may imply they are.
healthcareLandscape.note: MAJOR STATUS CHANGE: do not describe Leonard Morse as a general or acute hospital. Its emergency department closed in October 2020, and in February 2025 MetroWest filed to discontinue the remaining med/surg unit, ICU and operating rooms, converting the campus fully to behavioral health.

_howToFill: Every non-null value needs a source you actually read. majorFacilities is MARKET CONTEXT, never a client list — copy must say "serving practices in and around the {facility} corridor". Leave null rather than guess.
